scene: Isaiah\
"The virgin will conceive and give birth to a son — Immanuel"
"The LORD is bringing the floodwaters of the Euphrates against them"
"For to us a child is born — Wonderful Counselor, Prince of Peace"
"Does the axe raise itself above the one who swings it?"
"A shoot will come up from the stump of Jesse — the wolf and the lamb"
"With joy you will draw water from the wells of salvation"
Oracle against Babylon — "Babylon, the jewel of kingdoms, will fall"
"How you have fallen from heaven, morning star, son of the dawn"
Oracle against Moab — they wail on every high place
"Give shelter to the fugitives of Moab — be a shadow from the destroyer"
"Damascus will no longer be a city but will become a heap of ruins"
Oracle against Cush — "a land of whirring wings along the rivers"
"There will be an altar to the LORD in Egypt — and a monument at its border"
Isaiah walks naked and barefoot three years as a sign against Egypt
"Watchman, what is left of the night — watchman, what of the night?"
"I will place on his shoulder the key to the house of David"
Oracle against Tyre — "wail you ships — the harbor city is destroyed"
"The earth is broken up — it staggers like a drunkard — the curse devours"
"He will swallow up death forever — the LORD will wipe away all tears"
"Trust in the LORD forever — for the LORD is the Rock eternal"
"In that day a great trumpet will sound — the lost in Assyria will come"
"See, I lay in Zion a tested cornerstone — the one who trusts will not panic"
"In that day the deaf will hear — the eyes of the blind will see"
"Woe to those who go down to Egypt for help — lean on the shadow of a horse"
"Like birds hovering overhead the LORD will shield Jerusalem"
"The Spirit is poured on us from on high — the desert becomes a fertile field"
"Your eyes will see the king in his beauty — they will behold a land that stretches far"
"The LORD has a sword — it descends on Edom in judgment"
"The desert and parched land will be glad — the wilderness will rejoice and blossom"
Sennacherib\
One angel kills 185,000 Assyrians overnight — Sennacherib retreats
Hezekiah\
Hezekiah shows Babylon his treasury — Isaiah announces the coming exile
"Those who hope in the LORD will soar on wings like eagles — they will not grow weary"
"I will uphold you with my righteous right hand — do not fear for I am with you"
First Servant Song — "Here is my servant — a bruised reed he will not break"
"When you pass through the waters I will be with you — through the rivers they will not sweep you away"
"I will pour out my Spirit on your offspring — like streams on dry ground"
"I call you by name — Cyrus — though you do not acknowledge me"
"I have made you and I will carry you — I will sustain you and rescue you"
"Sit in darkness, daughter Babylon — you who thought you would be queen forever"
"I have refined you — I have tested you in the furnace of affliction"
"Can a mother forget the baby at her breast? — I will not forget you"
"I offered my back to those who beat me — my cheeks to those who pulled out my beard"
"You drank from the cup of his wrath — the goblet of his anger"
"How beautiful on the mountains are the feet of those who bring good news"
"He was led like a lamb to the slaughter — he bore the sin of many"
"Enlarge the place of your tent — for you will spread out to the right and left"
"As the rain and snow come down from heaven — so is my word — it will not return empty"
"My house will be called a house of prayer for all nations"
"I live in a high and holy place — but also with the one who is contrite and lowly in spirit"
"Is not this the fast I have chosen — to loose the chains of injustice?"
"Your iniquities have separated you from your God — his arm is not too short to save"
"Arise, shine, for your light has come — the glory of the LORD rises upon you"
"The Spirit of the Sovereign LORD is on me — oil of joy instead of mourning"
"You will be a crown of splendor in the LORD\
"I have trodden the winepress alone — their blood spattered my garments"
"We are the clay — you are the potter — we are all the work of your hand"
"See, I will create new heavens and a new earth — the wolf and the lamb will feed together"
"The LORD will come with fire — all mankind will come and bow down before me"
